calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Validity And Terms Of Lost Trust
Off Calendar Aug-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jason Louie for and with Siu Yip Wong (petitioner).

Mr. Louie stated that he has not heard of any objections, that he provided two notices of the petition and that he has nothing to add. The Petition for Order Confirming Validity and Terms of Lost Trust is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Validity And Terms Of Lost Trust
Off Calendar Jul-10-2024 Continued To Aug-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
